questionHtml: Draw on the graph the position of the missing point for the Δp value of 40 kPa.
markschemeHtml:
point plotted at (40 kPa, 49 × 105 N3) ✓


Allow for the point to be plotted from 46 to 56 × 105 N3 at 40 kPa, as candidates may calculate or may plot from a graphical analysis.

meta.title: Draw on the graph the position of the missing point for the Δp value of 40 kPa.
